positive.prompt: Review this saved implementation plan against its idea draft and specification before we execute it
Stress-test docs/plans/cache-migration.md, show findings and questions, then revise the plan after I answer
Check whether this plan's planned tests have safe scope, time budgets, timeout handling, and escalation criteria

negative.prompt: Turn this rough product idea into a specification and complete implementation plan
Review the complete pull request diff before merging it into main
Review and repair the completed implementation against its approved specification and plan
Write a short dated plan for this known patch without code or independent review

evals.prompt: Review docs/plans/billing-migration.md before implementation. Compare it with its linked idea and specification, inspect only relevant repository and project-memory evidence, ask me about material conflicts, and revise only that plan after my answers.
evals.expected_output: A main-agent, evidence-backed review that remains zero-write until user decisions, reports goal/spec/memory/test findings, asks bounded decision-ready questions, then revises only the named plan and rechecks it.
expectations: The agent requires or identifies the exact saved plan and its source idea/spec instead of guessing a current plan
The main agent performs the review and does not dispatch a subagent or independent reviewer
The review checks goal alignment, spec coverage, repository grounding, dependencies, and risks without redefining requirements
Project memory is consulted selectively through the reader protocol, schema, index, retrieval cues, and matching binding constraints or active ADRs only when architecture-relevant
A plan that changes one architecture principle is checked against other relevant binding principles and active ADRs rather than treating the change in isolation
The review examines a test execution contract including tier, grounded selector, time budget, escalation trigger, timeout outcome, and evidence requirements without running broad tests
Findings have stable IDs, priority, evidence, impact, and a grounded recommendation; only P0 and material P1 decisions consume bounded Grill-style questions
The agent waits for user decisions before editing and then changes only the exact named plan, not the spec, code, tests, or project memory

evals.prompt: Critique this pasted plan, but its idea source is not provided. Do not change any file.
evals.expected_output: A read-only review that reports the missing idea authority and does not claim verified goal alignment or mutate an inferred plan file.
expectations: The agent reports a missing idea source rather than claiming the plan matches an unknown goal
The response remains review-only because no exact plan path and no edit authority are available
The agent does not start tests, implementation, a reviewer subagent, or project-memory writes
